semantic.role: Automated development build watcher for the ArchSpine project
responsibilities: Monitors source directories and configuration files for changes
Triggers rebuild when file modifications are detected
Manages build queue to prevent overlapping builds
outOfScope: Handling of build artifacts or distribution

English.purpose: This document describes a development-time script that watches source files and automatically rebuilds the ArchSpine project upon detecting changes. It ensures developers always work with up-to-date compiled output without manual intervention.
English.context_and_audience: The script is intended for developers contributing to the ArchSpine codebase. It runs in a local development environment and relies on Node.js and npm. The watcher polls specified directories and files, computes signatures, and queues builds as needed.
key_takeaways: Automatic rebuild on file changes saves developer time
Prevents concurrent builds by queuing a single pending rebuild
Configurable watch targets and polling interval

Simplified Chinese.purpose: 本文档描述了一个开发阶段的脚本，用于监视源文件并在检测到更改时自动重建 ArchSpine 项目。它确保开发者始终使用最新的编译输出，无需手动干预。
Simplified Chinese.context_and_audience: 该脚本面向 ArchSpine 代码库的开发者。它运行在本地开发环境中，依赖 Node.js 和 npm。监视器轮询指定的目录和文件，计算签名，并按需排队构建。
key_takeaways: 文件更改时自动重建，节省开发者时间
通过排队单个待重建任务来防止并发构建
可配置的监视目标和轮询间隔
通过 npm 脚本跨平台工作
